name: Batanes
description: Remote northern islands known for rolling hills, lighthouses, and Ivatan culture.

name: Mountain Province Region
description: Highland region including Sagada and Banaue, famous for rice terraces and caves.

name: Ilocos
description: Historic towns, sand dunes, and coastal heritage from Vigan to Pagudpud.

name: Cebu
description: Gateway to the Visayas with beaches, lechon, and whale shark encounters in Oslob.

name: Bohol
description: Chocolate Hills, tarsiers, and island-hopping from Tagbilaran and Panglao.

name: Boracay
description: World-famous white-sand beach destination off Panay Island.

name: Siargao
description: Surf capital of the Philippines with Cloud 9 and island-hopping.

name: Palawan
description: El Nido, Coron, and Puerto Princesa — lagoons, limestone cliffs, and underground rivers.

name: Metro Manila
description: Capital region hub with Intramuros, museums, and major transport connections.

name: Davao
description: Mindanao gateway with Mount Apo, durian, and Samal Island access.

name: Cagayan de Oro
description: Adventure capital of Mindanao with white-water rafting and Camiguin ferry links.
